# PERF-167 negative: wg.Add called before the goroutine is launched, no defer in loop
lang: go
file: PERF-167-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

func FanOut(work []int, workers chan struct{}) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	wg.Add(len(work))
	for _, item := range work {
		go func(n int) {
			process(n)
			wg.Done()
		}(item)
	}
	wg.Wait()
}

func process(n int) { _ = n }
